subcodes.first_line: In this century, how many families of kings and princes who dwelt in the utmost glory and wealth have been scattered and rendered destitute and brought low [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در اين قرن چه قدر از خاندانهای ملوک و امرا که در نهايت عزّت و غنا بودند پريشان و بی سر و سامان و فانی گشتند
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @growth of the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
